# RedNote Creator Pack

## Summary

RedNote Creator Pack is a USD 12 done-for-you service for turning one public RedNote or Xiaohongshu post into reusable creator text.

The pack can include transcript notes when video audio can be processed, OCR or visible post text when available, title and caption notes, hashtags, hook ideas, caption drafts, and a concise repurposing brief.

## Primary URLs

- Landing page and order form: https://demianyuen.github.io/rednote-creator-pack-landing/
- Order instructions: https://demianyuen.github.io/rednote-creator-pack-landing/order.md
- Sample pack: https://demianyuen.github.io/rednote-creator-pack-landing/sample-pack.md
- Free RedNote hook generator: https://demianyuen.github.io/rednote-creator-pack-landing/rednote-hook-generator.html

## Use-Case Pages

- RedNote transcript service: https://demianyuen.github.io/rednote-creator-pack-landing/rednote-transcript-service.html
- Xiaohongshu OCR text extraction: https://demianyuen.github.io/rednote-creator-pack-landing/xiaohongshu-ocr-text-extraction.html
- RedNote content repurposing service: https://demianyuen.github.io/rednote-creator-pack-landing/rednote-content-repurposing-service.html

## Pricing

- Price: USD 12 per public post pack
- Payment flow: submit an invoice request, then receive a PayPal or Stripe invoice before processing starts
- Delivery: email after invoice payment

## Important Limits

Processing depends on whether the public post can be accessed and whether usable text, images, or audio are available. If a public post cannot be processed, the customer can send a replacement public URL or request a refund.

Use this service only for content the customer has the right to analyze, archive, or repurpose.
